content.text: Swap the manual flag parsing in parseArgs to use the flag package defaults.

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: cmd/run/args.go
@@ func parseArgs(args []string) (Options, error) {
 	opts := Options{}
-	opts.Verbose = has(args, "-v")
-	opts.Output = valueOf(args, "-o")
-	opts.Retries = intOf(args, "-r")
 	opts.Timeout = intOf(args, "-t")
+	opts.Verbose = boolFlag(fs, "v")
+	opts.Output = strFlag(fs, "o")
+	opts.Retries = intFlag(fs, "r")
 	opts.Format = valueOf(args, "-f")
 	return opts, nil
*** End Patch

content.content:
Successfully applied patch to the following files:
